news.headline: Schulte Hospitality Group partners with 34th Floor Hospitality to expand restaurant management capabilities in Louisville with 34th Floor Hospitality becoming a wholly subsidiary, forming a powerhouse in hotel and restaurant management.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky - Schulte Hospitality Group, a prominent hotel management and development entity, has disclosed a collaboration with 34th Floor Hospitality, a distinguished hospitality restaurant management company. In this venture, 34th Floor Hospitality transforms into a fully owned subsidiary of Schulte Hospitality Group, uniting their proficiency to establish a formidable entity in hotel and restaurant management. This deal allows Schulte Hospitality to elevate its restaurant capabilities, solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: Biden sees real opportunity for Ukraine to come out on top in their conflict
Biden: Meta's Fact-Checking Decision Is Shameful
Biden warns of up to 4 cent increase in gas prices
Carney Enters Race to Succeed Trudeau as Canada's Prime Minister
Biden Warns of Potential Gas Price Increase After Sanctions
Biden speaks on the economy
Harford Mutual Insurance Group in Bel Air, MD announces leadership changes, including Shane Crockett as new VP and Chief Underwriting Officer.
news.summary: In Bel Air, Maryland, on January 10, 2025, Harford Mutual Insurance Group revealed key leadership modifications to enhance its strategic business endeavors. Shane Crockett, a highly qualified professional with designations including CPCU, PMP, and AFIS, has been appointed as the Vice President and Chief Underwriting Officer at Harford Mutual. This move aims to bring in fresh talent to propel the company's operational goals forward.

news.headline: Nvidia stock sees significant weekly loss despite positive CES reception for CEO Jensen Huang.
news.summary: Despite receiving positive feedback for CEO Jensen Huang's presentation at CES, Nvidia stock experienced a significant weekly loss. This drop was particularly noteworthy, with the stock price decreasing despite the favorable reviews.

news.headline: Lennar sets dates for Millrose spin-off, announces dividend declaration; 80% of Millrose stock to be spun off.
news.summary: Lennar Corporation (NYSE: LEN and LEN.B) based in Miami disclosed on January 10, 2025, that its Board of Directors has approved a dividend and finalized the schedule for the anticipated taxable spin-off of about 80% of the shares of Millrose Properties, Inc. The spin-off aims to benefit shareholders and promote the growth of the company.

news.headline: Data breach at Samaritan Counseling Center of the Fox Valley, affecting residents of Wisconsin, discovered on Nov. 18, 2024.
news.summary: In MENASHA, Wisconsin, on January 10, 2025, the Samaritan Counseling Center of the Fox Valley initiated the notification process regarding a data security incident affecting the privacy details of specific Wisconsin residents. The center discovered this issue on November 18, 2024.

news.headline: Security camera market to grow by USD 3.85 billion (CAGR of 12.1%) from 2025-2029 due to AI and video analytics.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market evolution, revealing that the global security camera market is projected to expand significantly by an estimated USD 3.85 billion between 2025 and 2029. Research from Technavio suggests a steady growth rate, with the market expected to increase at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.1% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Expert Systems and Traws Pharma make breakthrough in H5N1 antiviral program with Tivoxavir Marboxil.
news.summary: In San Diego on January 10, 2025, Expert Systems reported a major advancement in Traws Pharma, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: TRAW) H5N1 antiviral program. The innovative drug, Tivoxavir Marboxil, achieved a significant milestone as a result of the hybrid AI-enabled drug discovery platform.

news.headline: Nasdaq-listed distiller to hold Bitcoin in treasury as a reserve, following MicroStrategy's lead.
news.summary: Heritage Distilling, a company listed on the Nasdaq, announced its intention to include Bitcoin in its treasury holdings. This decision comes after observing the actions of MicroStrategy and other companies who have also made similar moves.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. reports an unaudited NAV per share of $0.76 as of Dec. 31, 2024 - a Canadian venture capital firm.
news.summary: Based in Toronto, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE: IDK / OTCQX: IDKFF), a venture capital firm from Canada specializing in investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors, disclosed that as of December 31, 2024, its unaudited net asset value per share stood at $0.76.

news.headline: Infor Nexus introduces NexTrace, an end-to-end traceability solution at NRF 2025, enhancing data collection accuracy with AI tech.
news.summary: Utilizing advanced AI technology and prioritizing suppliers, a new solution has been introduced to streamline data collection procedures, ultimately enhancing precision and adherence to regulations. Recently unveiled in New York on January 10, 2025, the Infor Nexus™ platform serves as a unified supply chain network, offering unmatched capabilities for seamless operations.

news.headline: Altice USA cuts ties with MSG Networks, leaving Optimum subscribers without coverage of Knicks, Rangers, Islanders, and Devils.
news.summary: In a statement on Jan. 10, 2025, MSG Networks announced that Altice USA has withdrawn their latest proposal and ceased negotiations to restore MSG Networks to Optimum subscribers. Additionally, Altice USA has removed WPIX from their channel lineup during this dispute. The significant impact of this move affects a sizable number of viewers who are subscribed to Optimum services.

news.headline: Self-help guru James Arthur Ray, 67, dies following a retreat in Arizona where three people died in a sweat lodge.
news.summary: A promising figure in the realm of New Age inspiration speakers faced a downfall after a tragedy struck during one of his retreats in Arizona. The incident occurred in a sweat lodge where three individuals lost their lives.

news.headline: Rumble signs cloud deal with El Salvador gov, expands services include storage, computing, databases.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Longboat Key, Florida, video-sharing platform Rumble (NASDAQ:RUM) disclosed their new cloud partnership with the Government of El Salvador. This agreement signifies a shift towards companies like Rumble, embodying principles of freedom. The deal encompasses various cloud services for El Salvador, such as cloud storage including object and block storage, cloud computing, databases, load balancers, and Kubernetes integration. This move highlights the increasing global trend of aligning with companies like Rumble that value freedom and privacy.

news.headline: China ETFs see option trades fluctuate from profit to $100M loss.
Global immunoassay market to grow by USD 9.4 billion from 2025-2029 at 4.6% CAGR. Market segmented by product, technology, geography - Technavio.
news.summary: As of January 10, 2025, a recent report from Technavio suggests that the worldwide immunoassay market is projected to increase significantly by approximately USD 9.4 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth corresponds to a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.6% throughout the mentioned period. The report offers a detailed projection regarding various essential aspects in this market sector.

news.headline: Fed Vice Chair for Supervision Michael Barr is stepping down after facing criticism for his attempt to revamp financial regulations.
news.summary: Michael Barr managed an effort to revise financial regulations that faced opposition from various sectors, such as banks, legislators, and some of his peers.

news.headline: Ethan Allen to announce Q2 fiscal 2025 results on Jan 29, 2025, after market close. NYSE: ETD.
news.summary: Danbury, Connecticut - On January 8, 2025, leading furniture company Ethan Allen Interiors Inc. ("Ethan Allen" or the "Company") revealed that it is scheduled to disclose its financial and operational performance for the fiscal 2025 second quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. The report will be made public after the market closes on Wednesday, January 29, 2025. Ethan Allen's shares are listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ETD.

news.headline: Saratoga Investment Corp. posts 1.1% rise in Adjusted NII/share, reaching LTM ROE of 9.2% for Q3 2025.
news.summary: The company has recorded a sequential quarterly growth of 1.1% in Adjusted Net Interest Income (NII) per share, excluding the impact of the one-time interest reserve reversal. Additionally, the company has achieved a Last Twelve Months (LTM) Return on Equity (ROE) of 9.2%.

news.headline: Fed minutes show concern over inflation and hint at slower interest rate cuts. Rates were reduced by 25 basis points, now at 4.25%-4.5%. Fed divided on future adjustments. Uncertainty due to policy shifts under new administration.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve's December meeting revealed unease about inflation's persistence and potential policy shifts under a new White House administration. The meeting saw a divide among policymakers on the pace of future rate adjustments, with the Fed cutting rates by 25 basis points to bring the federal funds rate to 4.25%-4.5%. The Fed emphasized the need for a delicate balance between curbing inflation and supporting economic growth. The meeting minutes indicated a potential slowdown in policy easing, with rising uncertainty about inflation and the broader economy due to potential shifts in fiscal and trade policies under the incoming Trump administration. Despite signs of moderating inflation, recent higher-than-expected readings suggest a longer wait for its return to normal levels.

news.headline: Orchid Island Capital declares monthly dividend of $0.12 per share for January 2025, to be paid on Feb 27.
news.summary: On January 8, 2025, Orchid Island Capital, Inc. declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.12 per share for January 2025. The dividend will be distributed on February 27, 2025, to shareholders of record as of January 31, 2025, with an ex-dividend date of January 31, 2025. The company is set to announce its next common stock dividend on February 12, 2025. Orchid Island Capital, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ORC.

news.headline: Trump faced no consequences for 34 hush money scheme felonies, per Bloomberg.
Northern Technologies International Corporation reports Q1 fiscal 2025 results, a leading developer of corrosion inhibiting products, with revenue of $10 million.
news.summary: On January 8, 2025, Northern Technologies International Corporation (NASDAQ: NTIC), known for its corrosion inhibiting products, bio-based, and biodegradable polymer resin compounds, disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2025.

news.headline: Dow Jones up; Nvidia at buy point before CEO Jensen Huang's speech. Nvidia stock breaks out past new buy point.
news.summary: On a positive note, the Dow Jones experienced an increase on Monday, propelled partly by Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's scheduled speech at CES that day. Additionally, Nvidia stock surged beyond a fresh buy point, marking a significant breakthrough.

news.headline: Fed meeting minutes reveal uncertainty about rate cuts. Chief economist notes "uncertain" mentioned 12 times. Trump's policies unknown.
news.summary: The minutes from the Federal Reserve's December meeting, released recently, reveal a lack of clarity among officials regarding future rate cuts due to uncertainty surrounding President-elect Donald Trump's policies and their potential impact on inflation. Chief economist Jeffrey Roach from LPL Financial pointed out that variations of the word "uncertain" were used 12 times in the official record, expressing the challenges faced by participants in predicting interest rate trajectories amidst such uncertainty. This information was shared in a report from Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Calumet, Inc. will discuss closing of $1.44B loan in analyst call on Jan 13, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on January 10, 2025, Calumet, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMT) revealed its intention to conduct an analyst conference on January 13, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of this call is to address the finalization of their $1.44 billion secured loan with the U.S. government.

news.headline: Concrete Pumping Holdings reports financial results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024. Inc. (Nasdaq: BBCP), a leading provider of concrete pumping and waste management services in the U.S. and U.K.
news.summary: On January 8, 2025, Concrete Pumping Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBCP), a prominent firm offering concrete pumping and waste management solutions in the United States and United Kingdom, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Hopeful supporters of Nippon Steel's $15 billion bid for U.S. Steel are looking to Trump for a potential revival.
news.summary: Backers of the $15 billion deal for U.S. Steel to be acquired by Japan’s Nippon Steel remain optimistic that Donald Trump may intervene to revive the sale.

news.headline: Rocket Lab partners with NASA for Neutron rocket under VADR contract, expanding missions for CubeSats and payloads, with capacity to deliver up to multiple orbits.
news.summary: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (NASDAQ: RKLB) has announced a partnership with NASA to incorporate its Neutron rocket into the Venture-Class Acquisition of Dedicated and Rideshare contract. The agreement allows Rocket Lab to utilize its reusable medium-lift launch vehicle, Neutron, to enhance its services for various missions such as CubeSats, Class D missions, and other payload types in different orbits. Neutron is designed to provide a reliable launch option for both commercial and government clients, with the capability of carrying payloads of up to [specific number not provided] into orbit.

news.headline: Shell PLC shares are up after Shell Offshore Inc began production at the Whale facility in the Gulf of Mexico. Shell has a 60% stake, Chevron U.S.A. Inc. holds 40%.
news.summary: Shares of Shell PLC (NYSE:SHEL) are experiencing an upswing on Friday following the initiation of production at the Whale floating production facility in the Gulf of Mexico by its subsidiary, Shell Offshore Inc. This project, inspired by the Vito platform and commencing operations in early 2023, has been executed in a cost-effective manner. The endeavor is a collaboration between Shell Offshore, controlling a 60% interest, and Chevron U.S.A. Inc., which possesses the remaining 40% share. More details on this development are accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) launches Retail Cloud and Agentforce solutions to improve retail productivity and shopper experience.
news.summary: On Friday, Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) saw a decline in its shares as it unveiled two innovative AI-powered solutions for the retail sector. The new offerings, Agentforce for Retail and Retail Cloud with Modern POS, are designed to optimize efficiency for store staff, customer service teams, and digital sellers while delivering more personalized shopping experiences.Agentforce for Retail presents a ready-to-use collection of agent skills, allowing retailers to implement AI agents that can automate various tasks such as order management and appointment scheduling, ultimately enhancing shopper interaction on a broader scale.Conversely, Retail Cloud with Modern POS merges online and in-store data onto a single platform, furnishing features like mobile POS and clienteling. These solutions are geared towards transforming and elevating the retail experience through cutting-edge AI technology.For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Pfizer reports positive results from Phase 3 trial for anti-PD-1 mAb in bladder cancer, meeting primary endpoint.
news.summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) recently disclosed the top-line findings from its Phase 3 CREST trial, which focused on assessing sasanlimab, an experimental anti-PD-1 monoclonal antibody (mAb), in conjunction with Bacillus Calmette-Guérin (BCG) for induction therapy in BCG-naïve, high-risk non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC) patients. The trial successfully achieved its primary objective of enhancing event-free survival as per investigator evaluation. The results illustrated a significant and clinically important enhancement with sasanlimab. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Shares of social media stocks Meta, Snap, Trump Media rise as Supreme Court debates TikTok ban. Chief Justice Roberts skeptical about TikTok ties to China.
news.summary: Stocks of social media companies Snap, Inc. (NYSE:SNAP), Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. (NASDAQ:DJT), and Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) are increasing in value today as the U.S. Supreme Court discusses the potential ban of TikTok. Oral arguments are ongoing in the Supreme Court case opposing the imminent ban of TikTok, with Justices expressing doubts about the arguments made by TikTok's attorneys. Chief Justice John Roberts raised concerns about TikTok's connections to China and referenced Congress's findings regarding ByteDance's cooperation. For more information, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Daversa Partners promotes 5 to Managing Director roles in Los Angeles, boasting nearly 50 years of combined experience.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Daversa Partners, a leading executive search firm in the technology industry specializing in building leadership teams for growing and venture-backed companies, has promoted Lyndy Adamonis, Tara Cremin, Megan Daversa, Jodie Salzberg, and Ava Talbott to Managing Directors. Collectively, they contribute almost fifty years of experience. Their strengths lie in establishing extensive professional connections, delivering reliable outcomes for clients and candidates, and nurturing relationships within the tech sector.

news.headline: Truist starts coverage on BioNTech SE (NASDAQ:BNTX), transitioning to oncology. Analyst expects BNT327 to challenge PD-1 with $42B in 2023 revenue. Strategic edge over Summit Therapeutics (NASDAQ:SMMT).
news.summary: Truist recently began coverage on BioNTech SE (NASDAQ:BNTX), the renowned COVID-19 vaccine manufacturer in partnership with Pfizer Inc (NYSE:PFE). The company is shifting its focus from COVID-19 to oncology drug development and upcoming catalysts. Analyst Asthika Goonewardene highlighted the potential of BNT327, a cutting-edge drug that could compete with and exceed the PD-1 category, which raked in over $42 billion in 2023. Despite competition from Summit Therapeutics Inc’s (NASDAQ:SMMT) ivonescimab, BioNTech's solid financial standing and pipeline of complementary products give it a strategic advantage. Find more details on the story at Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cofactor Genomics names Chris Parker as CEO for accelerating commercial growth & increasing patient access to OncoPrism, with founder Jarret Glasscock transitioning to President & CTO.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Cofactor Genomics, Inc. has appointed Chris Parker as the new CEO and Board Member. Parker, a seasoned industry expert, will spearhead the company's efforts to advance precision medicine in immunotherapy. Concurrently, Cofactor Genomics announced that Jarret Glasscock, the company's founder and a scientist, will take on the positions of President, Chief Technology Officer (CTO), and Board Member. This move comes as the company looks to enhance its focus on RNA decoding and bridge the gap in precision medicine.

news.headline: President Joe Biden signed the Social Security Fairness Act, a victory for public sector unions after decades of push, into law.
news.summary: On Sunday, President Joe Biden achieved a significant win for public sector unions by signing the long-awaited Social Security Fairness Act into law. This victory comes after decades of advocacy from various unions.

news.headline: Turtle Beach Corp (Nasdaq: TBCH) to join 2025 ICR Conference with CEO & CFO attending on Jan. 13-15, at Orlando, FL.
news.summary: In White Plains, NY, on January 10, 2025, Turtle Beach Corporation (Nasdaq: TBCH), a prominent gaming accessory provider, revealed that CEO Cris Keirn and CFO John Hanson will join the 2025 ICR Conference from January 13-15, 2025, taking place at the Grande Lakes Resort in Orlando, FL.

news.headline: Newsom Invites Trump to California to Witness Wildfire Damage Personally
Camden Property Trust in LA not damaged by wildfires, ready to help affected residents with housing.
news.summary: Houston-based real estate company Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) revealed that its apartment complexes in the Los Angeles region remain unharmed by the recent wildfires. The company is prepared to aid individuals seeking housing assistance due to the disaster. Camden's primary concern is the well-being of its residents and staff, as well as supporting the community affected by this tragic incident. CEO Richard J. Campo affirmed the company's commitment to prioritizing health and safety during such challenging times.

news.headline: Carbon Done Right closes second tranche of private placement, issuing 10,000,000 shares at $0.015/share for $150,000 total. Total shares issued in placement now at 17,000,000, grossing $255,000.
news.summary: A Vancouver-based company, Carbon Done Right Developments Inc. ("Carbon Done Right" or "the Company"), a prominent supplier of high-quality carbon credits from self-owned afforestation and reforestation projects, has successfully concluded the second tranche of its non-brokered private placement. The placement, initially disclosed on December 20, 2024, and revised on January 8, 2025, involved the issuance of 10,000,000 shares priced at $0.015 each, generating $150,000 in total. This completion adds to the prior issuance of 7,000,000 shares, accumulating $255,000 in total gross proceeds from the ongoing non-brokered private placement.

news.headline: Magellan Health offers free 24-hour crisis line for wildfire victims in California. Toll-free number provided.
news.summary: Magellan Health, Inc. has unveiled a free 24/7 crisis line for individuals affected by the California wildfires. This resource is available at no cost to the community in FRISCO, Texas. The hotline can be reached toll-free and aims to provide support and assistance to those in need.

news.headline: Global false eyelashes market expected to grow by USD 513.3 million by 2029, with a CAGR of 6.2%, driven by AI and eye makeup trends.
news.summary: In a recent report using AI technology, it has been projected that the global market for false eyelashes is set to increase by USD 513.3 million between 2025 and 2029. This growth signifies a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Associated Capital Group estimates fourth quarter book value between $42.04 to $42.24 per share, with special dividend.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on Jan. 10, 2025, Associated Capital Group, Inc. ("AC" or the "Company") (NYSE: AC) disclosed a preliminary forecast for its fourth-quarter book value, ranging from $42.04 to $42.24 per share. These projections factor in a $2 per share special dividend distributed on November 4, 2024, to Class A and Class B shareholders recorded on October 21, 2024. This estimated range contrasts with a book value of $42.02 per share as of September 30, 2024.

news.headline: InnSuites Hospitality Trust (NYSE American: IHT) declares 55th consecutive annual dividend, reports record revenues of $505,422 in Dec.
news.summary: On January 8, 2024, the Board of Trustees of InnSuites Hospitality Trust (NYSE American: IHT) declared a semi-annual dividend of $0.01 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on February 5, 2025, to shareholders of record as of January 24, 2025. The hotel trust has a remarkable track record of providing annual dividends for 55 consecutive years. Additionally, InnSuites Hotel operations showed resilience, recording a total combined revenue of $505,422 in December for the two hotels located in Phoenix, AZ.
